title: Career Opportunity Store Manager at Star Bazaar

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Store Manager at Star Bazaar
jsonLd.description:
Star Bazaar invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Store Manager at our Ludhiana location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Star Bazaar:
Star Bazaar is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Learning & development budget
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Star Bazaar!
